filename: Data Protection Training and Awareness Documentation - November 2024.docx
summary: This document outlines the legally mandated tasks of the Data Protection Officer (DPO) for KeepMeCompany under GDPR Article 39. It details the appointment of the CTO as DPO, compliance monitoring processes, and cooperation with the UK Information Commissioner's Office (ICO). The document also lists staff awareness requirements and includes sign-off approval from the CTO and CEO.
